bird.name: 新幾內亞角鵰
bird.summary: 新幾內亞角鵰（學名：Harpyopsis novaeguineae）是一種大型的灰棕色猛禽，雌性體型略大於雄性。它是該屬下的唯一成員。 習性 新幾內亞角鵰是新幾內亞的特有種，棲息在未開發的熱帶雨林中。在島嶼上的巨蜥與袋獅滅絕後，新幾內亞角鵰成為當地頂級掠食者，主要的獵物為蛇、其…

relations.subject: 新幾內亞角鵰
relations.evidence: Cornell Lab of Ornithology, Ithaca, NY, USA. The main native habitat inhabited by Papuan eagles are undisturbed tropical rainforests. However, they will also utilize gallery forests, monsoon scrub forest and dry woodland
relations.object_summary: 结构复杂且冠层完整的高生物多样性森林。

relations.subject: 新幾內亞角鵰
relations.evidence: University of Papua New Guinea, Port Moresby, Papua New Guinea. The Papuan eagle is probably naturally scarce, but it is under the threat of habitat destruction by deforestation, as well as hunting
relations.object_summary: 开发、采伐和围垦等活动导致适宜生境减少。
